sections.paragraph: m. a fly, from the root זָבַב. Isa 7:18 Ecc 10:1, זְבוּבֵי מָוֶת “flies of death,” i.e. deadly, or poisonous [“dead, not poisonous, which is not in accordance with the context.” Thes.]; בַּעַל זְבוּב the lord of flies, see בַּעַל No. 5 , letter b. [“Arab. ذُبَابُ, Ch. דְּבָבָא id.”]
